1987	
1988	        const isBatched = Array.isArray(images);
1989	        const preparedImages = await prepareImages(images);
1990	
1991	        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImages);
1992	
1993	        const toReturn = [];
1994	        for (const batch of pixel_values) {
1995	            batch.dims = [1, ...batch.dims]
1996	            const output = await this.model.generate({ inputs: batch, ...generate_kwargs });
1997	            const decoded = this.tokenizer.batch_decode(/** @type {Tensor} */(output), {
1998	                skip_special_tokens: true,
1999	            }).map(x => ({ generated_text: x.trim() }))

2001	        }

# Plan: Add `image-text-to-text` Pipeline to Transformers.js

## Context

The Transformers.js library already defines `AutoModelForImageTextToText` in `src/models.js` with 11 supported architectures (LLaVA, Florence-2, PaliGemma, SmolVLM, Qwen2-VL, etc.), but no corresponding pipeline task exists yet. This plan adds an `ImageTextToTextPipeline` class following the exact patterns of `ImageToTextPipeline` and `DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline` — the two closest existing multimodal (image + text) references.

## Critical File

**`src/pipelines.js`** — the only file that needs to be modified (4 distinct changes).

---

## Step-by-Step Implementation

### Change 1 — Add import for `AutoModelForImageTextToText` (line ~44)

In the `import { ... } from './models.js'` block (lines 20–45), add one line after `AutoModelForImageToImage`:

```js
// Before (line 41-44):
    AutoModelForDocumentQuestionAnswering,
    AutoModelForImageToImage,
    AutoModelForDepthEstimation,
    AutoModelForImageFeatureExtraction,

// After:
    AutoModelForDocumentQuestionAnswering,
    AutoModelForImageToImage,
    AutoModelForImageTextToText,        // ← ADD THIS LINE
    AutoModelForDepthEstimation,
    AutoModelForImageFeatureExtraction,
```

---

### Change 2 — Add JSDoc typedefs + class (after line 2779)

Insert immediately after the closing `}` of `DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline` (line 2779) and the blank line that follows it, **before** the `VocoderOptions` comment block (line 2782):

```js
/**
 * @typedef {Object} ImageTextToTextSingle
 * @property {string} generated_text The generated text.
 * @typedef {ImageTextToTextSingle[]} ImageTextToTextOutput
 *
 * @callback ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback Generate text conditioned on an image and a text prompt.
 * @param {ImageInput} image The image to process.
 * @param {string} text The text prompt describing what to do with the image.
 * @param {Partial<import('./generation/configuration_utils.js').GenerationConfig>} [options] Additional keyword arguments to pass along to the generate method of the model.
 * @returns {Promise<ImageTextToTextOutput>} An array of objects containing the generated text(s).
 *
 * @typedef {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs & ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback & Disposable} ImageTextToTextPipelineType
 */

/**
 * Image-text-to-text pipeline using any `AutoModelForImageTextToText`. This pipeline generates text
 * conditioned on a given image and text prompt.
 *
 * **Example:** Generate a description of an image w/ `onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft`.
 * ```javascript
 * const pipe = await pipeline('image-text-to-text', 'onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft');
 * const url = 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/Xenova/transformers.js-docs/resolve/main/cats.jpg';
 * const output = await pipe(url, 'Describe this image in detail');
 * // [{ generated_text: 'Two cats are lying on a couch.' }]
 * ```
 */
export class ImageTextToTextPipeline extends (/** @type {new (options: TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs) => ImageTextToTextPipelineType} */ (Pipeline)) {

    /**
     * Create a new ImageTextToTextPipeline.
     * @param {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs} options An object used to instantiate the pipeline.
     */
    constructor(options) {
        super(options);
    }

    /** @type {ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback} */
    async _call(image, text, generate_kwargs = {}) {

        // NOTE: For now, we only support a batch size of 1

        // Preprocess image
        const preparedImage = (await prepareImages(image))[0];
        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImage);

        // Run tokenization
        const { input_ids } = this.tokenizer(text, {
            padding: true,
            truncation: true,
        });

        // Run model
        const output = await this.model.generate({
            inputs: input_ids,
            pixel_values,
            ...generate_kwargs,
        });

        // Decode output
        return this.tokenizer.batch_decode(/** @type {Tensor} */(output), {
            skip_special_tokens: true,
        }).map(x => ({ generated_text: x.trim() }));
    }
}
```

**Design notes:**
- Signature `_call(image, text, generate_kwargs)` mirrors `DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline._call(image, question, generate_kwargs)`.
- Returns a plain (non-batched) array like `DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline` — always `ImageTextToTextOutput`, never `ImageTextToTextOutput[]`. This is intentional: the pipeline processes one image+prompt pair at a time.

```js
/**
 * @typedef {Object} ImageTextToTextSingle

 *
 * @callback ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback Generate text conditioned on an image and a text prompt.

 * @param {string} text The text prompt describing what to do with the image.

 * @returns {Promise<ImageTextToTextOutput>} An array of objects containing the generated text(s).
 *
 * @typedef {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs & ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback & Disposable} ImageTextToTextPipelineType
 */

/**

 * conditioned on a given image and text prompt.

 * const output = await pipe(url, 'Describe this image in detail');
 * // [{ generated_text: 'Two cats are lying on a couch.' }]
 * ```

export class ImageTextToTextPipeline extends (/** @type {new (options: TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs) => ImageTextToTextPipelineType} */ (Pipeline)) {

    /**

    }

    /** @type {ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback} */

# Plan: Add `image-text-to-text` Pipeline to Transformers.js

## Context

The Transformers.js library already defines `AutoModelForImageTextToText` in `src/models.js` with 11 supported architectures (LLaVA, Florence-2, PaliGemma, SmolVLM, Qwen2-VL, etc.), but no corresponding pipeline task exists yet. This plan adds an `ImageTextToTextPipeline` class following the exact patterns of `ImageToTextPipeline` and `DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline` — the two closest existing multimodal (image + text) references.

## Critical File

**`src/pipelines.js`** — the only file that needs to be modified (4 distinct changes).

---

## Step-by-Step Implementation

### Change 1 — Add import for `AutoModelForImageTextToText` (line ~44)

In the `import { ... } from './models.js'` block (lines 20–45), add one line after `AutoModelForImageToImage`:

```js
// Before (line 41-44):
    AutoModelForDocumentQuestionAnswering,
    AutoModelForImageToImage,
    AutoModelForDepthEstimation,
    AutoModelForImageFeatureExtraction,

// After:
    AutoModelForDocumentQuestionAnswering,
    AutoModelForImageToImage,
    AutoModelForImageTextToText,        // ← ADD THIS LINE
    AutoModelForDepthEstimation,
    AutoModelForImageFeatureExtraction,
```

---

### Change 2 — Add JSDoc typedefs + class (after line 2779)

Insert immediately after the closing `}` of `DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline` (line 2779) and the blank line that follows it, **before** the `VocoderOptions` comment block (line 2782):

```js
/**
 * @typedef {Object} ImageTextToTextSingle
 * @property {string} generated_text The generated text.
 * @typedef {ImageTextToTextSingle[]} ImageTextToTextOutput
 *
 * @callback ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback Generate text conditioned on an image and a text prompt.
 * @param {ImageInput} image The image to process.
 * @param {string} text The text prompt describing what to do with the image.
 * @param {Partial<import('./generation/configuration_utils.js').GenerationConfig>} [options] Additional keyword arguments to pass along to the generate method of the model.
 * @returns {Promise<ImageTextToTextOutput>} An array of objects containing the generated text(s).
 *
 * @typedef {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs & ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback & Disposable} ImageTextToTextPipelineType
 */

/**
 * Image-text-to-text pipeline using any `AutoModelForImageTextToText`. This pipeline generates text
 * conditioned on a given image and text prompt.
 *
 * **Example:** Generate a description of an image w/ `onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft`.
 * ```javascript
 * const pipe = await pipeline('image-text-to-text', 'onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft');
 * const url = 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/Xenova/transformers.js-docs/resolve/main/cats.jpg';
 * const output = await pipe(url, 'Describe this image in detail');
 * // [{ generated_text: 'Two cats are lying on a couch.' }]
 * ```
 */
export class ImageTextToTextPipeline extends (/** @type {new (options: TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs) => ImageTextToTextPipelineType} */ (Pipeline)) {

    /**
     * Create a new ImageTextToTextPipeline.
     * @param {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs} options An object used to instantiate the pipeline.
     */
    constructor(options) {
        super(options);
    }

    /** @type {ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback} */
    async _call(image, text, generate_kwargs = {}) {

        // NOTE: For now, we only support a batch size of 1

        // Preprocess image
        const preparedImage = (await prepareImages(image))[0];
        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImage);

        // Run tokenization
        const { input_ids } = this.tokenizer(text, {
            padding: true,
            truncation: true,
        });

        // Run model
        const output = await this.model.generate({
            inputs: input_ids,
            pixel_values,
            ...generate_kwargs,
        });

        // Decode output
        return this.tokenizer.batch_decode(/** @type {Tensor} */(output), {
            skip_special_tokens: true,
        }).map(x => ({ generated_text: x.trim() }));
    }
}
```

**Design notes:**
- Signature `_call(image, text, generate_kwargs)` mirrors `DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline._call(image, question, generate_kwargs)`.
- Returns a plain (non-batched) array like `DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline` — always `ImageTextToTextOutput`, never `ImageTextToTextOutput[]`. This is intentional: the pipeline processes one image+prompt pair at a time.
- `inputs` = tokenized `input_ids` (the text), `pixel_values` = processed image — this is the standard calling convention for `imageTextToTextForward` (defined at line ~813 in models.js).
- `skip_special_tokens: true` + `.trim()` follows `ImageToTextPipeline` pattern exactly.
- Uses `TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs` (model + tokenizer + processor), the same constructor arg type as both reference pipelines.

---

### Change 3 — Add `SUPPORTED_TASKS` entry (after line 3255)

Insert immediately after the closing `},` of the `"image-to-text"` entry (line 3255), before the blank line leading to `"image-classification"`:

```js
    "image-text-to-text": {
        "tokenizer": AutoTokenizer,
        "pipeline": ImageTextToTextPipeline,
        "model": AutoModelForImageTextToText,
        "processor": AutoProcessor,
        "default": {
            "model": "onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft",
        },
        "type": "multimodal",
    },
```

**Placement rationale:** `image-text-to-text` is placed immediately after `image-to-text` because both are image→text generation tasks; the new one additionally conditions on a text prompt.

---

### Change 4 — Add to pipeline factory JSDoc (after line 3427)

In the `pipeline()` function's JSDoc task list (lines 3419–3440), insert one bullet alphabetically after the `"image-to-text"` line (line 3427):

```js
 *  - `"image-to-text"`: will return a `ImageToTextPipeline`.
 *  - `"image-text-to-text"`: will return a `ImageTextToTextPipeline`.   ← ADD
 *  - `"object-detection"`: will return a `ObjectDetectionPipeline`.
```

---

## Key Reused Patterns

| Pattern | Source |
|---|---|
| `export class X extends (/** @type {...} */ (Pipeline))` | `ImageToTextPipeline` (line 1975), `DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline` (line 2732) |
| `prepareImages(image)` helper | `ImageToTextPipeline` (line 1989), `DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline` (line 2748) |
| `this.processor(preparedImage)` → `{ pixel_values }` | Both reference pipelines |
| `this.tokenizer(text, { padding, truncation })` | `DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline` (line 2753) |
| `this.model.generate({ inputs, pixel_values, ...generate_kwargs })` | Matches `imageTextToTextForward` in models.js (line ~813) |
| `this.tokenizer.batch_decode(output, { skip_special_tokens: true })` | `ImageToTextPipeline` (line 1997) |
| `.map(x => ({ generated_text: x.trim() }))` | `ImageToTextPipeline` (line 1999) |
| `TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs` type | Both reference pipelines |
| `"type": "multimodal"` in SUPPORTED_TASKS | All image+text pipelines |

---

## Verification

1. **Type-check** (if applicable): ensure no TS errors with the new import and class.
2. **Smoke test** in Node.js / browser:
   ```javascript
   import { pipeline } from '@huggingface/transformers';
   const pipe = await pipeline('image-text-to-text', 'onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft');
   const out = await pipe('https://example.com/cats.jpg', 'Describe this image');
   console.log(out); // [{ generated_text: '...' }]
   ```
3. **Verify export**: `import { ImageTextToTextPipeline } from '@huggingface/transformers'` resolves (because `src/transformers.js` does `export * from './pipelines.js'`).
4. **Verify SUPPORTED_TASKS**: `pipeline('image-text-to-text')` (no model arg) should load `onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft` by default.
5. **Run existing tests** to confirm no regressions to other pipeline classes.
